case_title: JANET JOHNSON VS. ALAN C DAVIS ESQ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,878.49 FILED BY JOHNSON, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS ESQ, ALAN C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS ESQ, ALAN C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED OCT-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS ESQ, ALAN C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS ESQ, ALAN C $3,167.85 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,282.85, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT OF $844.76, AN AMOUNT DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
